reason_for_decision: The revised article now gives a clear beginner-facing architecture overview with enough mechanism, comparison logic, and system context to exceed the pass threshold.
strengths: The article now teaches the basic radar loop and then connects it directly to beam-steering architecture choices.
The comparison table makes mechanical scan, phased array, AESA, and OTH easier to separate conceptually.
The planning questions at the end increase decision value for non-specialist readers.
summary_assessment: This version is publishable. It is clearer, more technically grounded, and substantially more useful as a foundational architecture explainer.
